name: James Obi
title: Business Operations Manager
summary: Ops manager with a consulting background who brings structure to fast-moving teams. Owns KPI tracking, cross-functional project coordination, and revenue operations for a 200-person SaaS company. Former McKinsey analyst.

highlights: Owns revenue operations function — pipeline hygiene, forecasting, and CRM governance
Built company-wide KPI dashboard used by all VP+ stakeholders in weekly reviews
Drove annual vendor renegotiations saving $600k across 8 contracts
Led cross-functional workstream to consolidate 3 ops tools into a single system, reducing tool costs by 35%
Created budget forecasting model now used by finance team quarterly
Delivered operational transformation projects for clients in tech and financial services
Specialized in process design and change management workstreams
